blurb_en:
Meta's Muse Image — a tool that let anyone generate AI images using a public Instagram profile's photos, with all adult users enrolled by default — was removed on Friday, four days after launch, following backlash from users, SAG-AFTRA, and CAA.
• Tag a public account, generate images using their face. The subject receives no notification.
• Opting out required finding the setting yourself — no email, no alert, no warning.
• The core concern was not accidental misuse. It was that the design made deliberate misuse trivially easy.
• Meta's statement: “We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available.” Four days.
• For photographers, athletes, and creators posting publicly: Muse Image's brief existence is a preview of what the next version will look like.
blurb_zh:
Meta旗下Muse Image工具上线仅四天即于周五下架——该工具允许任意用户标记他人公开Instagram账号、生成AI图像，所有成年用户默认被纳入，在SAG-AFTRA、CAA等机构及大量用户抗议后被迫撤回。
• 标记任意公开账号，用当事人照片生成图像，当事人不会收到任何通知。
• 退出需自行找设置操作，无邮件提醒，无弹窗，什么都没有。
• 核心隐忧不是误用，而是功能设计本身就为蓄意滥用开了大门。
• Meta官方回应：「我们听取了反馈，认为这一功能偏离初衷，已停止提供。」四天。
• 对于公开发帖的摄影师、运动员和创作者而言：Muse Image的短暂存在，是下一个类似工具的预演。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Techweez (July 11), Deadline, Hollywood Reporter, and The National (July 11). Cross-referenced with TechCrunch launch story (July 7). DB has 2026-07-08-meta-muse-image-instagram-default covering the launch; this covers the distinct pulldown event four days later.

blurb_en:
The RIAA, Recording Academy, IFPI, SAG-AFTRA, and four other music industry bodies announced a voluntary program on Thursday to label AI-generated and AI-assisted recordings, proposing two distinct icons for adoption by streaming platforms.
• “AI” in all caps: the track's key elements — lead vocals, primary instruments, or the whole thing — were generated by AI.
• “ai” in lowercase: created substantially by humans, with AI contributing to specific expressive elements.
• Voluntary. Streaming platforms have not committed to adopting it.
• Two AI music copyright rulings are expected this month, including a German GEMA case on July 31. Those will carry more weight than any icon.
• For creators building short-form video with AI-generated music: this labeling framework is where the audio you use is heading.
blurb_zh:
美国唱片工业协会（RIAA）、格莱美、IFPI、SAG-AFTRA等八家音乐行业机構于周四宣布推出自愿性AI音乐标签计划，拟为流媒体平台引入两种图标，区分AI生成与AI辅助的音频作品。
• 『AI』大写：歌曲整体或主要元素（主唱、主奏）由人工智能生成。
• 『ai』小写：以人类创作为主，AI仅参与部分表现元素。
• 该计划系自愿性质，流媒体平台尚未承诺采用。
• 本月将有两项AI音乐版权判决出炉——其中包括7月31日的德国GEMA案——实质影响远大于任何图标。
• 对使用AI生成配乐制作短视频的创作者：你们用的背景音乐，正在向这套标签体系靠拢。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety (July 10), Digital Music News (July 10), Billboard, and RIAA official press release. Program details consistent across all sources. Not in DB despite July 10 article date.

blurb_en:
Mistral AI released Robostral Navigate on Tuesday, an 8-billion-parameter model that guides robots through real environments using a single RGB camera and plain-language instructions, with no LiDAR, depth sensors, or multi-camera rig required.
• Tell it: “Leave the lobby, walk through the corridor, enter the supply room, stop at the second shelf.” It does it.
• Trained on 400,000 simulated trajectories across 6,000 scenes, then refined with reinforcement learning.
• Hits 76.6% success on the standard R2R-CE navigation benchmark — 9.7 points above the best previous single-camera approach.
• Works across wheeled, legged, and flying platforms without modification.
• For imaging hardware: a competitive navigation model built around one cheap lens rather than a sensor array is a live argument for what good optics plus good AI can replace.
blurb_zh:
Mistral AI于周二发布Robostral Navigate，一款80亿参数的机器人导航模型，仅需单个RGB摄像头和自然语言指令，无需激光雷达、深度传感器或多摄像头阵列，即可引导机器人完成实际环境导航。
• 指令示例：「走出大堂，穿过走廊，进入储藏间，停在第二排货架前。」模型照做。
• 基于6000个场景中的40万条模拟轨迹训练，并通过强化学习进一步优化。
• 在标准导航基准R2R-CE上达76.6%准确率，较同类单摄像头最优方案高出9.7个百分点。
• 适用于轮式、腿式和飞行平台，无需更改模型。
• 对成像硬件行业：一套用廉价单镜头就能匹敌多传感器阵列的导航模型，是光学与AI结合潜力的实证。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Bloomberg (July 8), AI Insider (July 8), Silicon Republic, and Testing Catalog. Technical specs (8B params, 76.6% R2R-CE, 400K trajectories, 6K scenes) consistent across all sources. Not in DB.

blurb_en:
The EU AI Act's Article 50 takes effect August 2 — three weeks from today — requiring AI systems that generate synthetic images, video, or audio for European users to embed machine-readable provenance data in every output, or face fines up to 15 million euros.
• The technical standard named by the EU Commission is C2PA Content Credentials: a cryptographically signed, invisible tag embedded in the file that survives compression, cropping, and format conversion.
• Adobe Firefly, OpenAI image tools, and Google Imagen already embed C2PA manifests. Tools that don't have until August 2.
• New systems face the August 2 deadline; systems already deployed have until December 2, 2026.
• “We used a third-party API” is not a legal defence — the obligation extends to deployers, not just developers.
• For any imaging product that ships AI generation features to European users: this is no longer a roadmap item.
blurb_zh:
欧盟《人工智能法案》第50条将于三周后（8月2日）正式生效，要求所有向欧洲用户提供合成图像、视频或音频的AI系统，必须在每项输出中嵌入可机读的内容来源数据，违者最高可被罚款1500万欧元。
• 欧盟委员会指定的技术标准为C2PA内容凭证：一种嵌入文件的加密签名不可见标签，压缩、裁剪或格式转换后依然存在。
• Adobe Firefly、OpenAI图像工具和Google Imagen已支持C2PA；不支持的工具距截止日期仅剩三周。
• 全新系统须于8月2日前合规；已上市系统的截止日期延至2026年12月2日。
• 「我们使用的是第三方API」不是免责理由——合规义务同样适用于服务部署方。
• 对面向欧洲用户推送AI生成功能的成像产品：这已不再是路线图上的可选项。
verification_notes: Article 50 August 2 deadline confirmed via EU Council (June 29), artificialintelligenceact.eu, resemble.ai compliance guide, and C2PA Viewer. Distinct from 2026-05-09-eu-ai-omnibus-high-risk-delay (May 7 legislative agreement); this covers the specific Article 50 watermarking obligation and approaching deadline.
